title: Now Hiring Medical Officer at Becton Dickinson India

jsonLd.title: Now Hiring Medical Officer at Becton Dickinson India
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Medical Officer looking for your next big career move? Becton Dickinson India in Agra offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Becton Dickinson India:
Becton Dickinson India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance
• Proficiency in Wound Care
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in Surgical Procedures
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics
• Proficiency in Clinical Research

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Learning & development budget
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Agra, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Becton Dickinson India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
